market.key_reason_en: X posts show mixed S&P 500 views with AI bubble crash warnings balanced against longer-term bullish cycle projections and index rebalance chatter.

symbols.key_reason_en: Strong AI infrastructure demand and attractive forward valuation driving positive trader discussion.

top_news.summary_ko: 공식 테슬라 계정과 오너들이 수천 마일 무개입 주행, 향상된 속도·알림, 위험 감지를 공유. 유럽 규제 움직임과 신형 Model Y L 소식도 화제.

symbols.key_reason_en: Investors highlight exceptional Q1 margins, raised 2026 guidance, and see the pullback as a buy-the-dip opportunity driven by AIP momentum.

top_news.summary_en: Q1 adjusted operating margin ~60%, FCF margin 55-57%, commercial revenue acceleration and Rule of 40 score of 145% fuel positive investor threads despite price pullback.
